configuration_landmarks.entry_sequence: Press and hold FAN and SYSTEM MODE simultaneously
configuration_landmarks.save_sequence: Press SETTINGS button to commit and exit

known_codes.0101: No Compressor, Electric Heat, GL only
known_codes.1001: Heat Pump, No Heat, O-Valve, One Speed
known_codes.1002: Heat Pump, No Heat, O-Valve, GL+GH
known_codes.1011: Heat Pump, No Heat, B-Valve, One Speed
known_codes.1012: Heat Pump, No Heat, B-Valve, GL+GH
known_codes.1101: Heat Pump, Electric Heat, O-Valve, One Speed
known_codes.1102: Heat Pump, Electric Heat, O-Valve, GL+GH
known_codes.1111: Heat Pump, Electric Heat, B-Valve, One Speed
known_codes.1112: Heat Pump, Electric Heat, B-Valve, GL+GH
known_codes.2001: AC, No Heat, No Reversing, One Speed
known_codes.2002: AC, No Heat, No Reversing, GL+GH
known_codes.2101: AC, Electric Heat, No Reversing, One Speed
known_codes.2102: AC, Electric Heat, No Reversing, GL+GH

notes: Thermostat and HVAC unit must be powered before starting.
Configuration screens have a 30-second timeout. If no action is taken the thermostat exits configuration.

occ_trailing_digit.0: Occupancy Disabled / Door Switch Disabled / Temp Sensor Disabled
occ_trailing_digit.1: Occupancy Enabled / Door Switch Normally Closed / Temp Sensor Master
occ_trailing_digit.2: Door Switch Normally Open / Temp Sensor Average

pairing_a_sensor.description: Pair a new occupancy sensor, door switch, or temperature sensor to the thermostat
steps: Press and hold SYSTEM MODE and FAN buttons to access Mesh ID screen.
Press and hold SYSTEM MODE and FAN buttons again until 'ZbEE' appears.
Press SETTINGS button until 'SENS' appears.
Press the button on the sensor to activate pairing.
Press FAN button on thermostat to initiate pairing of a new sensor. This starts a 10-second countdown and displays the last 5 digits of discovered sensor IDs.
Use UP/DOWN buttons to toggle between discovered sensors.
Ensure the unique device ID on screen matches the unique device ID on the sensor.
Press SETTINGS button when the UniqueID (numerical) appears.
Select 'OCC1' for occupancy sensor, 'DS1' for door switch, 'rt1' for master temp sensor, 'rt2' for average temp sensor, or '0' to disable.
Press SETTINGS button. A 30-second countdown will begin. 'SUcc' will show when successfully paired.
If pairing fails press SYSTEM MODE button to try again.

configuring_sensor_functionality.description: Set or change what role a paired sensor plays after it is already linked
steps: Press and hold SYSTEM MODE and FAN buttons until Mesh ID appears.
Press and hold SYSTEM MODE and FAN buttons again until 'ZbEE' appears.
Press SETTINGS button until 'SENS' appears.
Press SETTINGS button to display the number of linked sensors.
Press SETTINGS button again to display the UniqueID of paired sensors. Use UP/DOWN to cycle through them.
Press SETTINGS button again. 'OCC1' will appear. Use UP/DOWN to change digits based on the OCC trailing digit table.
Press SETTINGS button to configure Door Switch functionality (dsx). Set to Normally Open (NO) or Normally Closed (NC) depending on reed switch type.
Press SETTINGS button to configure Temperature Sensor functionality (rtx).
Press SETTINGS button to finalize pairing.

verifying_and_unlinking_sensors.description: Check how many sensors are communicating or remove a linked sensor
steps: Press and hold SYSTEM MODE and FAN buttons until Mesh ID appears.
Press and hold SYSTEM MODE and FAN buttons again until 'ZbEE' appears.
Press SETTINGS button until 'SENS' appears.
Press SETTINGS button. Thermostat initiates a 10-second countdown then displays linked sensor count (e.g. '02.02' means 2 of 2 sensors communicating).
Press SETTINGS to display the first linked sensor. Use UP/DOWN to cycle through linked sensors.
To unlink: select the sensor then press and hold SETTINGS. A 5-second countdown will begin then display total number of linked sensors remaining.
Press SYSTEM MODE button to exit this configuration menu.
To reset the sensor: press the button on the sensor for 3 seconds until a yellow light turns on. The sensor is now reset and can be paired again.

occupancy_relay_invert.description: Changes occupancy relay from default 12V on Unoccupied to 12V on Occupied
steps: From room temperature screen press and hold CONFIG and FAN buttons to reach n0001 screen.
Press Gear Icon button until schedule screen appears.
Press and hold CONFIG and FAN buttons to advance to rSt screen.
Press and hold CONFIG and FAN buttons to advance to bt2.0u screen.
Press and hold CONFIG and FAN buttons to advance to OCC screen.
Press Gear Icon button to advance to nc screen.
Press DOWN button to advance to 'no' on screen.
Press ON/OFF button to save changes.

door_lock_integration.description: Verdant VX4 wired and wireless door lock pairing procedure

integration_types.one_way: Door locks must be networked and communicating with a Door Lock Management System for thermostat integration.
integration_types.two_way: Thermostat acts as the network. Door locks are not required to be networked. A ZigBee coordinator is required for wired/wireless integration.

notes: Integration with dormakaba requires ebox and dorma server setup and communicating.
Remove faceplate from thermostat before starting procedure.
Wireless: countdown appears on screen to confirm pairing to control card.
Dorma locks display as lock's respective short ZigBee ID.
Onity locks display as lock's respective serial number.
steps: Press and hold SYSTEM MODE and FAN buttons until MESH ID appears.
Press and hold SYSTEM MODE and FAN buttons until 'type' appears.
Press FAN button until 'Selc' shows on screen.
Press DOWN button to display 'Add' then press SETTINGS to display select list.
Press DOWN button until desired lock platform shows ('oni' or 'kaba') then press SETTINGS.
Allow countdown to complete until screen displays 'Found[1-8]'.
Use DOWN button to scroll through found devices in 'EuI_[lockid]_255' format.
Press SETTINGS to select and display '-cFg_[lockid]_255'.
Press DOWN once to display '1tag' screen then press SETTINGS to display 't---'.
Use UP/DOWN buttons to select tag number (typically t001) then press SETTINGS.
Press DOWN twice to display 'Acc' then press SETTINGS to accept.
Press SYSTEM MODE button to exit the menu system.

binding_steps: Unpack the VX4 faceplate and populate the rear battery chamber with 2 AA cells.
Verify the display initializes into the master 'SETUP' wizard mode interface.
Input the targeted project-specific 'Mesh ID' network identifier string.
Input the unique 4-digit 'Room Number' identifier using the interface toggle keys.
Input the required 'Equipment Code' matched and extracted from the mechanical design sheet.
Press the SETTINGS key once to trigger the 30-second localized RF proximity discovery window.
Confirm on-screen feedback matches the barcode label ID printed on the physical HVAC controller shell.
Press the SETTINGS key a second time to lock down the RF channel binding parameters.
